toolPurpose: Retrieve the home timeline of the authenticated user showing posts from followed accounts.

max_id.description: Return results older than this ID for pagination

since_id.description: Return results newer than this ID

min_id.description: Return results immediately newer than this ID (efficient pagination)

limit.description: Maximum number of statuses to return

toolPurpose: Retrieve the public or federated timeline showing posts visible to the wider Mastodon network.

local.description: If true, return only posts from this instance; if false, return federated posts from other instances

remote.description: If true, return only posts from remote instances (not local)

only_media.description: If true, return only statuses that have media attachments

limit.description: Maximum number of statuses to return

toolPurpose: Create and publish a new status (toot) to the authenticated user's account. Requires Steward confirmation for execution.

status.description: Text content of the status (up to 500 characters on standard instances, supports markdown and mentions)

media_ids.description: Array of media IDs to attach to the status (images, videos, audio files previously uploaded)

poll.description: Poll object with options and expiration

expires_in.description: How long the poll should be open in seconds

hide_totals.description: Hide vote counts until poll closes

in_reply_to_id.description: Status ID to reply to, making this a reply/thread continuation

sensitive.description: Mark status as sensitive (will be behind content warning)

spoiler_text.description: Content warning text to show before status content

visibility.description: Visibility scope: public (federated), unlisted (public but not in timelines), private (followers only), or direct (mentioned users only)

toolPurpose: Search across accounts, hashtags, and statuses in the Mastodon network using keyword queries.

q.description: Search query string (keywords, hashtags, or account handles)

type.description: Limit search results to specific content types

resolve.description: If true, resolve non-local accounts/hashtags via federation (slower but more complete)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed account information including profile data, follower counts, and activity statistics.

id.description: The account ID (numerical identifier or webfinger format like user@instance.social)

toolPurpose: Retrieve notifications for the authenticated user (mentions, follows, favorites, boosts, polls).

max_id.description: Return results older than this notification ID for pagination

since_id.description: Return results newer than this notification ID

limit.description: Maximum number of notifications to return

exclude_types.description: Exclude specific notification types from results
